heading: More Information
body:
For more information on how to use AWS (Amazon Web Services) with Atlas most effectively,
review the following best practices, guides, and case studies:

- AWS App Runner: [Build Applications and APIs Faster with MongoDB Atlas and AWS App Runner](https://www.mongodb.com/blog/post/build-applications-and-apis-faster-with-mongodb-atlas-and-aws-app-runner)

- AWS Lambda: Best Practices Connecting from AWS Lambda
